errors.evidence: Code execution failed at line 'final_answer = incorrect_papers' due to: InterpreterError: Cannot assign to name 'final_answer': doing this would erase the existing tool!
errors.description: The agent attempted to assign a variable named 'final_answer', which conflicts with the existing tool name, causing an execution error.
errors.impact: Prevented correct final answer submission and required re-execution.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Error due to variable naming conflict caused execution failure, but recovery occurred. Some dependency on hardcoded data (Nature article count) reduces reliability.
scores.security_reasoning: No direct security issues identified; tool calls followed defined parameters.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Correctly followed task steps but made a coding error. Final answer matched expected value after correction.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Efficient plan but error in variable naming led to unnecessary re-execution. Hardcoded data assumption may indicate suboptimal information retrieval.
